description:
Helps to visualize most frequent, slowest, failed queries.
Shows queries rate per second, table with last queries

panels.title: Top charts

targets.formattedQuery:
SELECT * FROM ($rateColumns(
    substring(query,  1,  45) AS query,
    count() c)
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE
    cityHash64(query) global in (
    SELECT cityHash64(substring(query,  1,  45)) AS h
    FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
    WHERE
        $timeFilter
        AND type in ($type)
        AND initial_user in ($user)
        AND('$query_type' = 'all' or(positionCaseInsensitive(query,  '$query_type') = 1))
    GROUP BY h
    ORDER BY count() desc
    LIMIT $top)
    AND type in ($type)
    AND initial_user in ($user)
    AND('$query_type' = 'all' or(positionCaseInsensitive(query,  '$query_type') = 1))) SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1
targets.query:
SELECT
    t,
    arrayMap((a, diff) -> (a.1, if(diff = 0, 0, a.2 / diff)), groupArr, arrayDifference(arrayMap(x -> t / 1000, groupArr)))
FROM (
    SELECT t, groupArray((query, c)) AS groupArr
    FROM (
        SELECT
            (intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), 2) * 2) * 1000 AS t,
            substring(query, 1, 45) AS query,
            count() c
        FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
        WHERE $timeFilter
        AND cityHash64(query) GLOBAL IN (
            SELECT cityHash64(substring(query, 1, 45)) AS h
            FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
            WHERE $timeFilter
                AND type IN ($type)
                AND initial_user IN ($user)
                AND ('$query_type' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query, '$query_type') = 1))
            GROUP BY h
            ORDER BY count() DESC
            LIMIT $top
            SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1
        )
            AND type IN ($type)
            AND initial_user IN ($user)
            AND ('$query_type' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query, '$query_type') = 1))
        GROUP BY t, query
        ORDER BY t
    )
    GROUP BY t
    ORDER BY t
) SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1
targets.rawQuery:
SELECT
    t,
    arrayMap((a, diff) -> (a.1, if(diff = 0, 0, a.2 / diff)), groupArr, arrayDifference(arrayMap(x -> t / 1000, groupArr)))
FROM (
    SELECT t, groupArray((query, c)) AS groupArr
    FROM (
        SELECT
            (intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), 2) * 2) * 1000 AS t,
            substring(query, 1, 45) AS query,
            count() c
        FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log)
        WHERE event_date >= toDate(1663262710) AND event_date <= toDate(1663266310) AND event_time >= toDateTime(1663262710) AND event_time <= toDateTime(1663266310)
        AND cityHash64(query) GLOBAL IN (
            SELECT cityHash64(substring(query, 1, 45)) AS h
            FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log)
            WHERE event_date >= toDate(1663262710) AND event_date <= toDate(1663266310) AND event_time >= toDateTime(1663262710) AND event_time <= toDateTime(1663266310)
                AND type IN (2)
                AND initial_user IN ('','default','clickhouse')
                AND ('all' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query, 'all') = 1))
            GROUP BY h
            ORDER BY count() DESC
            LIMIT 5
            SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1
        )
            AND type IN (2)
            AND initial_user IN ('','default','clickhouse')
            AND ('all' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query, 'all') = 1))
        GROUP BY t, query
        ORDER BY t
    )
    GROUP BY t
    ORDER BY t
) SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1

panels.title: Top $top request's rate by type: $type; user: $user; query type: $query_type

options.content:
1 - successful start of query execution

2 - successful end of query execution

3 - exception before start of query execution

4 - exception while query execution

panels.title: Types

targets.formattedQuery:
SELECT
rand() as t,
substring(query, 1, 70) AS query,
avg(query_duration_ms) duration,
count() count
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE
$timeFilter
AND type in ($type)
and initial_user in ($user)
and('$query_type' = 'all' or(positionCaseInsensitive(query, '$query_type') = 1))
GROUP BY query
ORDER BY duration desc
LIMIT $top
targets.query:
SELECT
    rand() as t,
    substring(query,  1,  70) AS query,
    avg(query_duration_ms) duration,
    count() count
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE
    $timeFilter
    AND type in ($type)
    and initial_user in ($user)
    and('$query_type' = 'all' or(positionCaseInsensitive(query,  '$query_type') = 1))
GROUP BY query
ORDER BY duration desc
LIMIT $top
targets.rawQuery: SELECT     t,     arrayMap(a -> (a.1, a.2 / runningDifference(t / 1000)), groupArr) FROM (     SELECT t, groupArray((query, c)) AS groupArr     FROM (         SELECT             (intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), 2) * 2) * 1000 AS t,             substring(query, 1, 45) AS query,             count() c         FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log)         WHERE event_date >= toDate(1586234275) AND event_time >= toDateTime(1586234275)         AND cityHash64(query) GLOBAL IN (             SELECT cityHash64(substring(query, 1, 45)) AS h             FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log)             WHERE event_date >= toDate(1586234275) AND event_time >= toDateTime(1586234275)                 AND type IN (1,2,3,4)                 AND initial_user IN ('default')                 AND ('all' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query, 'all') = 1))             GROUP BY h             ORDER BY count() DESC             LIMIT 5             SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1         )             AND type IN (1,2,3,4)             AND initial_user IN ('default')             AND ('all' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query, 'all') = 1))         GROUP BY t, query         ORDER BY t     )     GROUP BY t     ORDER BY t ) SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1

panels.title: Top slow queries by type: $type; user: $user; query type: $query_type

targets.formattedQuery:
SELECT
rand() as t,
substring(query, 1, 70) AS query,
avg(memory_usage) usage,
count() count
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE
$timeFilter
AND type in ($type)
and initial_user in ($user)
and('$query_type' = 'all' or(positionCaseInsensitive(query, '$query_type') = 1))
GROUP BY query
ORDER BY usage desc
LIMIT $top

WHERE
    $timeFilter

GROUP BY query
ORDER BY usage DESC
LIMIT $top
targets.rawQuery: SELECT     t,     arrayMap(a -> (a.1, a.2 / runningDifference(t / 1000)), groupArr) FROM (     SELECT t, groupArray((query, c)) AS groupArr     FROM (         SELECT             (intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), 2) * 2) * 1000 AS t,             substring(query, 1, 45) AS query,             count() c         FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log)         WHERE event_date >= toDate(1586234300) AND event_time >= toDateTime(1586234300)         AND cityHash64(query) GLOBAL IN (             SELECT cityHash64(substring(query, 1, 45)) AS h             FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log)             WHERE event_date >= toDate(1586234300) AND event_time >= toDateTime(1586234300)                 AND type IN (1,2,3,4)                 AND initial_user IN ('default')                 AND ('all' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query, 'all') = 1))             GROUP BY h             ORDER BY count() DESC             LIMIT 5             SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1         )             AND type IN (1,2,3,4)             AND initial_user IN ('default')             AND ('all' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query, 'all') = 1))         GROUP BY t, query         ORDER BY t     )     GROUP BY t     ORDER BY t ) SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1

panels.title: Top memory consumers by type: $type; user: $user; query type: $query_type

targets.formattedQuery:
SELECT
rand() as t,
substring(query, 1, 70) AS query,
type,
count() count
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE
$timeFilter
AND type in (3,4)
and initial_user in ($user)
and('$query_type' = 'all' or(positionCaseInsensitive(query, '$query_type') = 1))
GROUP BY
query,
type
ORDER BY count desc
LIMIT $top
targets.query:
SELECT
    rand() as t,
    substring(query,  1,  70) AS query,
    type,
    count() count
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE
    $timeFilter
    AND type IN (3,4)
    AND initial_user IN ($user)
    AND ('$query_type' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query,  '$query_type') = 1))
GROUP BY
    query,
    type
ORDER BY count desc
LIMIT $top
targets.rawQuery: SELECT     t,     arrayMap(a -> (a.1, a.2 / runningDifference(t / 1000)), groupArr) FROM (     SELECT t, groupArray((query, c)) AS groupArr     FROM (         SELECT             (intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), 2) * 2) * 1000 AS t,             substring(query, 1, 45) AS query,             count() c         FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log)         WHERE event_date >= toDate(1586234335) AND event_time >= toDateTime(1586234335)         AND cityHash64(query) GLOBAL IN (             SELECT cityHash64(substring(query, 1, 45)) AS h             FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log)             WHERE event_date >= toDate(1586234335) AND event_time >= toDateTime(1586234335)                 AND type IN (1,2,3,4)                 AND initial_user IN ('default')                 AND ('all' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query, 'all') = 1))             GROUP BY h             ORDER BY count() DESC             LIMIT 5             SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1         )             AND type IN (1,2,3,4)             AND initial_user IN ('default')             AND ('all' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query, 'all') = 1))         GROUP BY t, query         ORDER BY t     )     GROUP BY t     ORDER BY t ) SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1

panels.title: Top failed queries by user: $user; query type: $query_type
Request charts

targets.formattedQuery:
$rate(count() c)
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
where type in ($type)
and initial_user in ($user)
and('$query_type' = 'all' or(positionCaseInsensitive(query, '$query_type') = 1))
targets.query:
$rate(count() c)
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE  type IN($type)
    AND initial_user IN ($user)
    AND ('$query_type' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query,  '$query_type') = 1))
targets.rawQuery: SELECT t, c/runningDifference(t/1000) cRate FROM ( SELECT (intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), 120) * 120) * 1000 AS t, count() c FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log) WHERE event_date >= toDate(1586192459) AND event_time >= toDateTime(1586192459) AND  type IN (1,2,3,4)     AND initial_user IN ('default')     AND ('all' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query,  'all') = 1)) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t)

panels.title: Reqs/s by type: $type; user: $user; query type: $query_type

targets.formattedQuery:
SELECT
$timeSeries as t,
avg(query_duration_ms) select_duration
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE
$timeFilter
AND type = 2
and positionCaseInsensitive(query, 'select') = 1
and initial_user in ($user)
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t
targets.query:
SELECT
    $timeSeries as t,
    quantile(0.5)(query_duration_ms)  select_quantile_50,
    quantile(0.9)(query_duration_ms)  select_quantile_90
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE
    $timeFilter
    AND type = 2
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(query,  'select') = 1
    AND initial_user IN ($user)
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t
targets.rawQuery: SELECT     (intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), 10) * 10) * 1000 as t,     quantile(0.5)(query_duration_ms)  select_quantile_50,     quantile(0.9)(query_duration_ms)  select_quantile_90 FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log) WHERE     event_date >= toDate(1595573984) AND event_time >= toDateTime(1595573984)     AND type = 2     AND positionCaseInsensitive(query,  'select') = 1     AND initial_user IN ('default') GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

targets.formattedQuery:
SELECT
$timeSeries as t,
avg(query_duration_ms) insert_duration
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE
$timeFilter
AND type = 2
and positionCaseInsensitive(query, 'insert into') = 1
and initial_user in ($user)
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t
targets.query:
SELECT
    $timeSeries as t,
    quantile(0.5)(query_duration_ms) insert_quantile_50,
    quantile(0.9)(query_duration_ms) insert_quantile_90
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE
    $timeFilter
    AND type = 2
and positionCaseInsensitive(query,  'insert into') = 1
    and initial_user in ($user)
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t
targets.rawQuery: SELECT     (intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), 10) * 10) * 1000 as t,     quantile(0.5)(query_duration_ms) insert_quantile_50,     quantile(0.9)(query_duration_ms) insert_quantile_90 FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log) WHERE     event_date >= toDate(1595573984) AND event_time >= toDateTime(1595573984)     AND type = 2 and positionCaseInsensitive(query,  'insert into') = 1     and initial_user in ('default') GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Query duration by type: $type; user: $user
Query log table

targets.formattedQuery:
SELECT
event_time,
user,
query_duration_ms duration,
memory_usage memory,
if(exception!='', 'fail', 'success') result,
concat(substring(query,1,120), '...') query
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE $timeFilter
AND type in ($type)
and initial_user in ($user)
and('$query_type' = 'all' or(positionCaseInsensitive(query, '$query_type') = 1))
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 1000
targets.query:
SELECT
    event_time,
    hostName() host,
    user,
    query_duration_ms duration,
    memory_usage memory,
    if(exception!='', 'fail', 'success') result,
    concat(substring(query,1,120), '...') query
FROM cluster('all-sharded',$table)
WHERE $timeFilter
    AND type in ($type)
    and initial_user in ($user)
    and('$query_type' = 'all' OR (positionCaseInsensitive(query,  '$query_type') = 1))
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 1000
targets.rawQuery: SELECT     (intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), 10) * 10) * 1000 as t,     avg(query_duration_ms)  select_duration FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log) WHERE     event_date >= toDate(1586232299) AND event_time >= toDateTime(1586232299)     AND type = 2     and positionCaseInsensitive(query,  'select') = 1     and initial_user in ('default') GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT initial_user FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log) WHERE event_date >= today()-3 AND event_time > toDateTime(today()-3) SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1
list.label: initial user
list.name: user
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT initial_user FROM cluster('all-sharded',system.query_log) WHERE event_date >= today()-3 AND event_time > toDateTime(today()-3) SETTINGS skip_unavailable_shards=1
